name: team_task_get_blockers
description: Retrieve all incomplete dependency tasks that are currently blocking a given task from progressing. Returns the list of tasks that must be completed before the specified task can transition to in_progress. Use this to diagnose why a task is not yet actionable and identify which upstream work needs attention.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the task to check for blockers

examples.name: Check what is blocking a task
Diagnose why a compiled task cannot start
